title: Fix handling of ThrottleWriteIOPSDevice
body:
This is causing the UBuntu tests to fail.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

LGTM, I had opened exactly the same PR: https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/6502
There is still one more issue with Ubuntu.  The real problem is without Ubuntu we are not testing against Cgroups V1 right now.
